.glass:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3); transform: translateY(-2px); } /* Header */ header { padding: 28px 32px 20px; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; background: rgba(10,14,39,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(30px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(30px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--glass-border); } .header-inner { max-width: 1600px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; } .logo-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,212,170,0.3); } .logo h1 { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-bright); letter-spacing: -0.3px; } .logo .subtitle { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 400; } /* Search */ .search-wrap { flex: 1; min-width: 280px; max-width: 520px; position: relative; } .search-wrap input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 16px 10px 42px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 12px; color: var(--text-bright); font-size: 14px; font-family: inherit; transition: all 0.3s ease; outline: none; } .search-wrap input:focus { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,212,170,0.15); } .search-wrap input::placeholder { color: var(--text-dim); } .search-icon { position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 16px; } /* Stats bar */ .stats-bar { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .stat-chip { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .stat-chip .num { font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; } .stat-chip.critical .num { color: var(--crit-critical); } .stat-chip.high .num { color: var(--crit-high); } .stat-chip.medium .num { color: var(--crit-medium); } .stat-chip.low .num { color: var(--crit-low); } /* Layout */ .app-layout { max-width: 1600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; display: flex; gap: 24px; min-height: calc(100vh - 100px); } /* Sidebar */ .sidebar { width: 300px; flex-shrink: 0; position: sticky; top: 100px; max-height: calc(100vh - 124px); overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px; scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1) transparent; } .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; } .sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 4px; } .cat-item { padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 2px; transition: all 0.2s ease; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text-dim); } .cat-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: var(--text); } .cat-item.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,212,170,0.15), rgba(123,97,255,0.1)); color: var(--text-bright); font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,170,0.2); } .cat-num { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; color: var(--accent); } .cat-item.active .cat-num { background: rgba(0,212,170,0.2); } .cat-count { margin-left: auto; font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 8px; } .cat-chevron { margin-left: 4px; font-size: 10px; opacity: 0.4; transition: transform 0.2s ease; flex-shrink: 0; } .cat-item.active .cat-chevron { transform: rotate(90deg); opacity: 0.7; } .subcat-list { max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.3s ease; margin-left: 24px; border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .subcat-list.open { max-height: 2000px; } .subcat-item { padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; margin: 1px 0; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); transition: all 0.15s ease; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .subcat-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: var(--text); } .subcat-item.active { background: rgba(0,212,170,0.1); color: var(--accent); } .subcat-item .sc-count { margin-left: auto; font-size: 10px; opacity: 0.4; flex-shrink: 0; } /* Main content */ .main-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } /* Category header */ .cat-header { padding: 24px 28px; margin-bottom: 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,212,170,0.08), rgba(123,97,255,0.06)); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .cat-header::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -50%; right: -10%; width: 300px; height: 300px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,212,170,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%); border-radius: 50%; } .cat-header h2 { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-bright); margin-bottom: 8px; position: relative; } .cat-header .cat-meta { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-dim); position: relative; display: flex; gap: 16px; } /* Filter bar */ .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0 4px; } .filter-btn { padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; font-family: inherit; } .filter-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: var(--text); } .filter-btn.active { background: rgba(0,212,170,0.15); border-color: rgba(0,212,170,0.3); color: var(--accent); } .filter-btn.crit { border-color: rgba(255,71,87,0.3); } .filter-btn.crit.active { background: rgba(255,71,87,0.15); color: var(--crit-critical); } .filter-btn.high { border-color: rgba(255,140,66,0.3); } .filter-btn.high.active { background: rgba(255,140,66,0.15); color: var(--crit-high); } .filter-btn.med { border-color: rgba(255,217,61,0.3); } .filter-btn.med.active { background: rgba(255,217,61,0.15); color: var(--crit-medium); } .filter-btn.low2 { border-color: rgba(107,203,119,0.3); } .filter-btn.low2.active { background: rgba(107,203,119,0.15); color: var(--crit-low); } /* Subcategory section */ .subcat-section { margin-bottom: 24px; } .subcat-header { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); padding: 8px 4px; margin-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,212,170,0.15); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .subcat-count { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); font-weight: 400; } /* Use case cards */ .uc-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; } .uc-card { padding: 18px 20px; cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .uc-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 3px; height: 100%; border-radius: 3px 0 0 3px; } .uc-card.critical::before { background: var(--crit-critical); } .uc-card.high::before { background: var(--crit-high); } .uc-card.medium::before { background: var(--crit-medium); } .uc-card.low::before { background: var(--crit-low); } .uc-card-head { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .uc-id { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; color: var(--text-dim); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); flex-shrink: 0; } .uc-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-bright); line-height: 1.3; } .uc-crit-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 5px; } .uc-crit-dot.critical { background: var(--crit-critical); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--crit-critical); } .uc-crit-dot.high { background: var(--crit-high); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--crit-high); } .uc-crit-dot.medium { background: var(--crit-medium); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--crit-medium); } .uc-crit-dot.low { background: var(--crit-low); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--crit-low); } .uc-value { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.5; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .uc-tags { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 10px; } .uc-tag { font-size: 10px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(123,97,255,0.1); color: #a89aff; border: 1px solid rgba(123,97,255,0.15); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; max-width: 200px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } /* Detail modal */ .modal-overlay { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); z-index: 1000; display: none; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; padding: 60px 24px; overflow-y: auto; } .modal-overlay.show { display: flex; } .modal { width: 100%; max-width: 800px; background: rgba(18,22,52,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(40px); border: 1px solid var(--glass-border); border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), inset 0 1px 0 var(--glass-highlight); padding: 32px; animation: modalIn 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } @keyframes modalIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.97); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } } .modal-close { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 20px; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.2s; z-index: 10; } .modal-close:hover { background: rgba(255,71,87,0.2); color: var(--crit-critical); border-color: rgba(255,71,87,0.3); } .modal-head { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; padding-right: 44px; } .modal-crit-badge { padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; } .modal-crit-badge.critical { background: rgba(255,71,87,0.15); color: var(--crit-critical); border: 1px solid rgba(255,71,87,0.3); } .modal-crit-badge.high { background: rgba(255,140,66,0.15); color: var(--crit-high); border: 1px solid rgba(255,140,66,0.3); } .modal-crit-badge.medium { background: rgba(255,217,61,0.15); color: var(--crit-medium); border: 1px solid rgba(255,217,61,0.3); } .modal-crit-badge.low { background: rgba(107,203,119,0.15); color: var(--crit-low); border: 1px solid rgba(107,203,119,0.3); } .modal h2 { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-bright); line-height: 1.3; } .modal-id { font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 4px; } .modal-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .modal-section h3 { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 600; } .modal-section p, .modal-section div { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--text); } .spl-block { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; overflow-x: auto; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; color: #c8d0e0; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-all; position: relative; } .spl-block .copy-btn { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; transition: all 0.2s; } .spl-block .copy-btn:hover { background: rgba(0,212,170,0.2); color: var(--accent); } .modal-meta-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; } .meta-item { padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .meta-item h4 { font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.8px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 4px; } .meta-item p { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); margin: 0; } /* Nav arrows */ .modal-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 24px; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .nav-btn { padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; transition: all 0.2s; } .nav-btn:hover { background: rgba(0,212,170,0.15); color: var(--accent); border-color: rgba(0,212,170,0.3); } .nav-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.3; cursor: not-allowed; } /* No results */ .no-results { text-align: center; padding: 60px 20px; color: var(--text-dim); } .no-results .big { font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .no-results p { font-size: 15px; } /* Overview grid */ .overview-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .overview-card { padding: 16px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; } .overview-card .ov-num { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); } .overview-card .ov-name { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 4px; line-height: 1.3; } .overview-card .ov-count { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: 6px; opacity: 0.6; } .overview-card:hover .ov-num { color: var(--text-bright); } /* Responsive */ @media (max-width: 900px) { .app-layout { flex-direction: column; } .sidebar { width: 100%; position: relative; top: 0; max-height: none; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; padding: 12px; } .cat-item { padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 12px; } .uc-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .modal-meta-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .header-inner { gap: 12px; } } /* Scrollbar */ ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 3px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
